title: Security: Referrer Header Spoofing Vulnerability via <base> tags
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
While doing some analysis it was observed that when a <base> tag is set to a page and a css request is being made to a page, Chrome browser makes use of the url in base tag as a referrer header value , this is only valid in case a base header is set , in case the head
